deleteConfirm.title: Delete this deck?
deleteConfirm.description: This will remove the deck and all its version history.

validity.legendaryOverLimit: {cardId}: legendary may have at most 1 copy.
validity.offClassCard: {cardId} is a {cardClass} card; deck class is {deckClass}.
validity.heroInMainDeck: {cardId}: hero cards are not allowed in the main deck.

import.title: Import Deck
import.deckstringLabel: Paste a deckstring or load from clipboard

error.unknownCard: This deck references a card not in your card database (cardId: {cardId}). The deckstring may be from a future patch.

export.title: Export Deck
export.illegalDeck: Cannot export an illegal deck. Add the missing cards first.

error.nonCollectible: This deck contains cards that cannot be saved (generated tokens, cosmetic copies, etc.).

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure your experience and tracker behavior.
settings.appBehaviorDescription: Manage how the application launches and runs.
settings.languageDescription: Choose the display language for the app.
settings.autoStartDescription: Launch the app when your computer starts
settings.minimizeToTrayDescription: Keep running in background when closed
settings.hardwareAccelerationDescription: Use GPU to render UI. Disable if you experience stuttering.
settings.deckTrackerDescription: Configure what information is shown during matches.
settings.showPlayerTrackerDescription: Display remaining cards in your deck
settings.showOpponentTrackerDescription: Track cards played by your opponent
settings.secretsHelperDescription: Display possible secrets when opponent plays one
settings.underConstructionDescription: These settings will be available in the next update. Please check back later.

deckTracker.deckNotDetected: Current deck not detected. Select it in the dialog.

deckSelect.title: Select the deck for this match
deckSelect.description: Automatic detection failed. Choose the deck you are currently using.
deckSelect.empty: No saved decks. Create a deck in Hearthstone first.
